# Zod 3.x — no formal spec

Zod is a TypeScript library, not a standardized format. There is no spec separate from the library's source and README.

Closest authoritative reference: the colinhacks/zod repository and its README (https://github.com/colinhacks/zod). Pinning a minor version (e.g. 3.23.x) recommended for any concrete claim.

This file is generated by `scripts/download-specs.py`.
